$comment: Single source of truth for all inter-service message contracts. JSON on the wire, camelCase keys. Field descriptions are the spec. See CLAUDE.md.

EventResolvedEvent.title: EventResolvedEvent
EventResolvedEvent.description: Odds Service or Admin -> Core API. Signals that a sports event has concluded with a known outcome. Core consumes this to settle any held bets on the event.

outcome.description: Resolved outcome of a sports event.

BetHeldNotification.title: BetHeldNotification
BetHeldNotification.description: Core API -> Notifications. Per-user notification: a bet entered the held state.

BetSettledNotification.title: BetSettledNotification
BetSettledNotification.description: Core API -> Notifications. Per-user notification: a bet was settled. `payout` is profit only (matches Bet.payout semantics — see bets.service.ts).

BalanceUpdatedNotification.title: BalanceUpdatedNotification
BalanceUpdatedNotification.description: Core API -> Notifications. Per-user notification: wallet balance changed (in dollars, not cents).

InsufficientBalanceNotification.title: InsufficientBalanceNotification
InsufficientBalanceNotification.description: Core API -> Notifications. Per-user notification: a bet placement was rejected because the requested stake exceeded the user's available balance.

NotificationEvent.title: NotificationEvent
NotificationEvent.description: Any service -> Notifications Service. Fire-and-forget envelope; `userId` empty means broadcast. `payload` is the inner message object matching `kind`.

kind.description: Discriminator for the body; maps to a socket.io event name in the notifications relay.

payload.description: Inner message object matching `kind`; relayed verbatim to the socket.
